description_long: This object is a rectangular, monolithic device with a glossy black finish and a prominent upright section at the rear, resembling a modern router or modem. The base is broad and flat, with a slightly raised platform and a beveled front edge that features gold-colored text, possibly for branding or labeling. The upright section is thick and solid, suggesting internal electronics and structural support. The front face displays a plaque-like area with Cyrillic text, dates, and a short inscription, giving it a formal, commemorative appearance. The sides and rear are smooth and unadorned, with no visible ports, buttons, or indicator lights. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with a strong emphasis on geometric lines and a polished surface.
description: A sleek, glossy black router or modem with a broad base, upright rear section, and gold text on the front. The design is minimalistic and formal, with no visible ports or indicator lights.
description_view_0: The left side view shows the thick upright section and the broad, flat base, with the gold text on the beveled front edge partially visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the gold Cyrillic text, dates, and inscription on the beveled edge, as well as the full width of the base and the upright rear section.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the upright section and base, with the gold text on the front edge visible at an angle.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the solid upright section and the base, with no visible text, ports, or features.
